creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Chase the move of net/rrdtool to databases/rrdtool. Since this
    is the same program, this one also has to be moved.

Fix: 

Repocopy:
	net/rrdtool10	-> databases/rrdtool10

Change categories:
	net		-> databases graphics

Affected ports:
	net/jffnms

I volunteer to do the changes in the above mentioned ports.
